---
title: "dictKv()"
description: "Create an in-memory typed KV tier preloaded from a record."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create an in-memory typed KV tier preloaded from a record.

## Import

```ts
import { dictKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function dictKv(
	entries: Record<string, T> = {},
	codec: Codec<T> = jsonCodecFor<T>(),
): KvStorageTier<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `entries` | `Record<string, T>` | entries value used by the helper. |
| `codec` | `Codec<T>` | Codec used to encode and decode stored values. |

## Returns

A `KvStorageTier<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { dictKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/kv.ts`
